articles.title: Pool Supplier Leslie’s Considers Potential Chapter 11 Bankruptcy
articles.summary: Pool supplier Leslie’s Inc. is considering a range of strategic options to address its debt load, including a potential Chapter 11 bankruptcy filing, according to people familiar with the matter.

articles.title: US 30-Year Yield Raises Alarm in Longest Run Above 5% Since 2007
articles.summary: The US 30-year bond yield has held above 5% for the longest stretch since the dawn of the financial crisis, echoing investor concerns about a growing debt pile and sticky inflation.

articles.title: Kuwait Sells $6 Billion of Bonds Despite Iran Strikes
articles.summary: Kuwait raised $6 billion from a three-part dollar bond sale on Wednesday, highlighting resilient demand for the OPEC member’s debt even as it comes under daily missile and drone attacks from Iran.
